mnemonics.title: Processing Pipeline
mnemonics.content: SNVD: Sample → Noise Remove → Voxel Downsample → Describe (features)

acronyms.usage: Standard format for storing 3D point cloud and mesh data

visualTips.visualization: Imagine 3D graph paper - each cube cell aggregates nearby points

analogies.analogy: Like stars in the sky - dense in some regions (constellations), sparse in others
